description: Style Note Proudly display your fashion sense with this casual shirt from locomotive. The Fit enhances your figure while the look oozes easy charm. Team this with jeans and sports shoes on a day out with friends or with leather shoes and a cool jacket for an evening date to create an excellent impression.  Product Details Blue and grey patterned shirt, has a slim spread spread collar, full buttoned placket, back yoke, short fold over sleeves with buttons to hold the fold in place, patch pocket on the left chest, branding above the pocket, stitched panel from the yoke to the hemline at the back, embroidered detail above the hemline and a curved hemline Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash warm Do not bleach Tumble dry normal Use warm iron Size and Fit Regular Fit The model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M Style NoteProudly display your fashion sense with this casual shirt from Locomotive.
